title: microsorum grossum
intro: Microsorum grossum, also known as Polypodium grossum, is a type of fern native to tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its large, leathery leaves and ability to grow in a variety of environments. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Microsorum grossum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve wound healing, and reduce symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Microsorum grossum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used in traditional remedies.
